# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    # Read input
    A = list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split()))
    B = list(map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split()))
    
    # Compute cumulative sums
    total_A = sum(A)
    total_B = sum(B)
    
    # Calculate the minimum runs needed for Team Aoki to win
    required_runs = total_A - total_B + 1
    
    # Ensure the result is non-negative (if required_runs is negative, Aoki can win with 0 runs)
    print(max(required_runs, 0))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
